problem id: 8a0867ce
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHR(1)

examples:
  01000111 -> 00100011
  01100011 -> 00110001
  10111011 -> 01011101
  10010000 -> 01001000
  11011000 -> 01101100
  10101000 -> 01010100
  11101000 -> 01110100
  00000101 -> 00000010
  01110111 -> 00111011
  01101011 -> 00110101

query: 11101111
predicted answer: 01110111
